sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0

SELECT C.FOLDER_ID, C.FOLDER_NAME, IFNULL(D.COUNT, 0) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT A.FOLDER_ID, A.FOLDER_NAME FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMO B ON A.FOLDER_ID = B.FOLDER_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND A.USER_ID = #user_id# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND A.DELETE_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY A.FOLDER_ID ) C LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM TBL_MEMO D WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY FOLDER_ID) D ON C.FOLDER_ID = D.FOLDER_ID
SELECT USE_DATE, USE_GADGET, FONT_SIZE, FOLD_STATUS FROM TBL_MEMO_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
SELECT * FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO (user_id, write_date, folder_id, order, company_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#user_id#, #write_date#, #folder_id#, #order#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#)
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG SET
USE_DATE = #use_date# , USE_GADGET = #use_gadget#
, FONT_SIZE = #font_size#
, layer_width = #layer_width#
, layer_height = #layer_height#
, layer_top = #layer_top#
, layer_left = #layer_left#
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO_FOLDER (FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, REG_DATE, USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#folder_id#, #folder_name#, #reg_date#, #user_id#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#)
SELECT MAX(FOLDER_ID)+1 FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME = #folder_name# WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET DELETE_FLAG = 1 WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_FOLDER SET DELETE_FLAG = 1 WHERE FOLDER_NAME = #folder_name# AND FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
